pkgmetadata.longdescription: ntpd-rs is a full-featured implementation of the Network Time Protocol (NTP) with support for Network Time Security (NTS, RFC 8915), written in Rust by the Pendulum project (Tweede Golf / Trifecta Tech Foundation) with support from the ISRG/Prossimo memory-safety initiative. It provides the ntp-daemon time daemon, the ntp-ctl control utility, and the ntp-metrics-exporter observability endpoint.
